resources.string: The Ident-ID you entered cannot be found.\nE101
This Ident-ID has expired or has been deleted.\nE102
The identification for this Ident-ID has already been completed.\nE103
There was an error in reading the identification resources data. Please try again later.\nE130
There was an error in retrieving the identification resources data. Please try again later.\nE131
There was an error while starting the ident: Invalid response from backend. Please try again later.\nE150
There was an error while starting the ident: Server issue. Please try again later.\nE151
There was an error while starting the ident: Missing session key. Please try again later.\nE152
The identification process has failed. Please try again.\nE160
This session has expired. Please try again.\nE170
The identification process has failed. Please try again.\nE171
Application context has been cleared. Please try again.\nE180
Oops, something went wrong. Please try again.\nCode: {errorCode}
